fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry assigned by the auto-increment process.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the cost adjustment action message.

fields.name: Message
fields.tooltip: Specifies the message text of the cost adjustment action message.

fields.name: Next Check Date/Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when the next check of the cost adjustment action message is scheduled.

fields.name: Importance
fields.tooltip: Specifies the importance of the cost adjustment action message.

fields.name: Table Id
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table ID of the record related to the action message.

fields.name: System ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique identifier of the record related to the action message.

fields.name: Active
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the cost adjustment action message is active or not.

fields.name: Custom Dimensions
fields.tooltip: Specifies the custom dimensions of the cost adjustment action message that contains additional information.
